name: CertificateExpiryNotification
description: CertificateExpiryNotification schema from SASE Multitenant Notifications

notificationId.description: Unique identifier for this notification delivery.

tsg_id.description: Tenant Service Group identifier for the affected tenant.

certificateName.description: Name of the certificate approaching expiration.

daysUntilExpiry.description: Number of days remaining until the certificate expires.

usedBy.description: List of SASE services or configurations using this certificate.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when this notification was generated.
